goal: Add a scoped real-adapter evidence bundle promotion helper so an externally produced CUDA evidence bundle can be verified with the existing strict bundle verifier and then copied into canonical artifacts/review only when the bundle is GO. This moves the remaining M6-RC blocker toward safe external evidence intake without changing verifier acceptance policy or claiming M6-RC/v0 GO.
head: f240bf1
blocked_scope: Pulling Docker images or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a promotion helper that verifies an external real-adapter evidence bundle and copies only the fixed verifier-required evidence files into a target artifacts directory when the bundle is GO, add focused tests, rerun readiness, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Promotion helper verifies a bundle with the existing strict verifier before any copy
Promotion helper copies only the fixed files required by verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py and only when the expected GO decision is proven
Dry-run NOT_GO mode writes verification and promotion manifest without mutating the target directory
Focused tests cover GO promotion, NOT_GO dry-run no-copy behavior, and source/target safety checks
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not pull Docker images, run CUDA training, run Docker endpoint capture, or commit copied external evidence bundles.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped evidence bundle promotion gate for externally produced CUDA evidence bundles.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed current tooling assembles and verifies bundles but does not promote an external verified GO bundle into canonical review artifacts.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/promote_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py and focused tests for GO promotion, NOT_GO dry-run, expected-GO rejection, and source/target safety.
phase_notes.check: Focused tests passed, current artifacts/review NOT_GO promotion dry-run wrote /tmp verification and manifest without promotion, v0 readiness remained expected NOT_GO, and M1 smoke bootstrap passed in .venv.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real-adapter evidence bundle promotion helper, focused tests, WORKING.md, readiness artifact, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no Docker pulls, no model artifacts, no copied external evidence bundle commit, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
